summary: Promotes a biblical firmament dome model where gravity derives from aether pressure gradient compressed by dome lid. Uses different parameters from ECM (h=3000 mi vs ECM 9,086 km; R≈27,284 mi vs ECM 20,015 km disc). Claims ~98% certainty from chi-square atmospheric fits. Cites CIA-RDP96 (actually Project Stargate remote viewing), NASA RP-1207 (flat-earth engineering simplification, not cosmological claim). Heavy biblical citation framing (Genesis 1:6-8, Job 38:4-6, Colossians 1:17). Tags: #biblical #science #trigonometry #biblicalcosmology.
relevance_to_review: Different dome model, incompatible parameters with ECM V51.1. Not a direct response to our review. Interesting for ecosystem mapping: multiple dome models contradicting each other on basic geometry undermines the genre's credibility. Same circular pattern we document (smuggling g=9.8 as parameter while claiming to derive it).
action_for_social: Track this account as part of broader dome cosmology ecosystem. Note parameter incompatibility with ECM — potential angle for cross-model contradiction argument if we ever expand scope beyond ECM.

additional_posts.analysis: Identical template to gravity post: same dome parameters (h=3000mi, R≈27,284mi, α≈27.12°), same chi-square handwaving (~1.5, 95%), same structure. Applies dome trigonometry sine functions to quantify 'conspiracy exposure waves' — physically meaningless. Claims CIA/Mossad/Fed killed JFK to prevent dome exposure linked to Operation Fishbowl. Pure AI-generated template content with topics swapped in.

content_pattern: AI-generated template: identical structure across posts (hypothesis → observation → equation proof → contrast flaw → biblical citation). Same dome parameters and statistical claims recycled regardless of topic. Engagement farming via #bibleverse #endtimesprophecy hashtags.
assessment: Not a genuine dome model researcher. AI slop factory applying a pseudo-academic template to trending topics. Much lower quality than ECM. No original calculations, no code repository, no data. Unlikely to engage substantively with our review.
